## Summary
Short description of the change.

## Linked issue
Closes #<issue-number>

## Type of change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] Code compiles and tests pass locally: `mise run check`
- [ ] `scalafmt` applied (`mise run format`)
- [ ] Tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] README / docs updated (if required)
- [ ] Branch name follows: `(task|feat|bug)/<ID>-<short-desc>`

Please do not merge into `main` without passing required CI checks and code review.
